title: feat: enable app listed quest
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Enables `app_listed` by checking the existing Tinybird `app_directory_public` read model.
- Keeps BYOP app-growth quests as `coming_soon` and inert.
- Bumps the quest catalog cache key so the available state is visible after deploy.
- Validated with `npx vitest run test/quests.test.ts` and `npm run typecheck`.

gist.headline: The hive directory grows
gist.blurb: The 'App Listed' quest is officially live! Get your app into the public directory and earn some sweet Pollen for your efforts.
gist.summary: Enabled the 'app_listed' quest by integrating with the Tinybird app directory read model, allowing users to earn Pollen when their app is listed publicly.
gist.impact: Developers can now claim Pollen rewards for successfully listing their applications in the public directory.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) pinning a tiny app icon or poster onto a public directory notice board, receiving a glowing Pollen coin in return.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning a tiny pixelated app icon onto a wooden community notice board. A glowing golden Pollen coin drops into her little tool belt. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley vibes. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
